notes: Promoted KiCad-backed protected USB-C I2C pass fixture with an AMS1117 3.3 V rail, I2C sensor, pull-ups, decoupling, and header. VCC_3v3 contact proof retains each physical regulator pad shape, uses deterministic left-to-right fragment flow on the declared board, and routes only physical regulator bypass copper. Strict KiCad 10.0.3 ERC and DRC are clean when run outside the restricted macOS sandbox. Fabrication release still requires manufacturer-specific AMS1117 ESR, effective-capacitance, and thermal review.
